{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20971_1
|class_id=20971
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20971_2
|fame=33
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=15
|tech=12
|ss1=Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +10<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss2=Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +20<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss3=Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss4=Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss7=Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180<br> (Awakened)
}}
